title: triticum thaoudar
side_effects: Triticum thaoudar can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, prolonged use can cause liver damage and elevated levels of liver enzymes. Additionally, improper preparation and consumption of Triticum thaoudar may also lead to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Furthermore, it can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse effects.
